allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8731/companies/1" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "modelPicker"\) { "modelPicker: found" } else { "modelPicker: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "LOOPER_MODELS"\) { "LOOPER_MODELS: found" } else { "LOOPER_MODELS: MISSING" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8731/settings" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "modelCatalog"\) { "modelCatalog: found" } else { "modelCatalog: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "LOOPER_MODELS"\) { "LOOPER_MODELS: found" } else { "LOOPER_MODELS: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "model-filter-pill"\) { "filter pills: found" } else { "filter pills: MISSING" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8731/agents/1" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "modelPicker"\) { "modelPicker: found" } else { "modelPicker: MISSING" })

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import app.update; import app.config; print\('update ok'\); print\('IS_PUBLISHER:', app.config.IS_PUBLISHER\); print\('version file:', app.config.VERSION_FILE\); print\('local version:', app.update.get_local_version\(\)\)")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8731 -State Listen 2>$null; if \($conn\) { "Listening on 8731 — PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Not up yet" })
